options.name: --choose
options.description: Select one or more recipes to run using another program

name: -c
--command
options.description: Run an arbitrary command with the working directory, .env, overrides, and exports

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Print what just would do, without doing it

options.name: --dotenv-filename
options.description: Use a file with this name instead of .env

options.name: --dotenv-path
options.description: Load the environment file from a path instead of searching for one

options.name: --dump-format
options.description: Specify the format for dumping the justfile

name: -e
--edit
options.description: Edit the justfile with $VISUAL or $EDITOR, falling back to vim

options.name: --highlight
options.description: Highlight echoed recipe lines in bold

name: -l
--list
options.description: List available recipes and their arguments

options.name: --list-heading
options.description: Print this text before the list

options.name: --list-prefix
options.description: Print this text before each list item

options.name: --set
options.description: Override a variable with a value

args.name: value
args.description: The string value the variable will be set to

options.name: --shell
options.description: Invoke this shell to run recipes

options.name: --shell-arg
options.description: Invoke the shell with this as an argument

options.name: --shell-command
options.description: Invoke --command with the shell used to run recipe lines and backticks

name: -u
--unsorted
options.description: Return list and summary entries in source order

name: -d
--working-directory
options.description: Use this as the working directory
